Comment: disable static fallback and redeploy prod

commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && python3 - <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
import re
path = Path(".env")
text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
line = "RESULTS_API_ENABLE_STATIC_FALLBACK=false"
if "RESULTS_API_ENABLE_STATIC_FALLBACK=" in text:
    text = re.sub(r"^RESULTS_API_ENABLE_STATIC_FALLBACK=.*$", line, text, flags=re.M)
else:
    text += "\n" + line + "\n"
path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
print(line)
PY
docker compose --env-file .env config --quiet && chmod +x deploy/ec2/deploy.sh && ./deploy/ec2/deploy.sh'
